CARTESCATS.GMOnly: Only the Game Master can open the card dealer.
CARTESCATS.ResetDeckConfirm: This reshuffles the whole deck and clears every player's hand. Continue?
CARTESCATS.DragHint: Drag a player from one column to the other to add or remove them from the participants (double-click also works).
CARTESCATS.NoParticipants: Drag at least one player into the participants.
CARTESCATS.PileTooShort: There weren't enough cards left in the deck to deal the requested amount to everyone.
CARTESCATS.NoCardsYet: You haven't received any cards yet.
